articles.title: ChatGPT voice mode is a weaker model
articles.description:
I think it's non-obvious to many people that the OpenAI voice mode runs on a much older, much weaker model - it feels like the AI that you can talk to should be the smartest AI but it really isn't.
If you ask ChatGPT voice mode for its knowledge cutoff date it tells you April 2024 - it's a GPT-

articles.title: Production AI Playbook: Human Oversight
articles.description: Deploying AI without oversight can be a liability. This post covers how to keep humans in control of the decisions that matter, including three practical patterns, a framework for when to apply them, and hands-on templates for deeper exploration.
